## Pick #1 — Score: 8/10

**BMW Unveils Electric M Concept at Le Mans — and It's Packing 1,000bhp**
*Google News - BMW + 4 more*
[Read the full article →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
**Live Pick:** true

**Why it matters:**
BMW chose the 24 Hours of Le Mans — motorsport's most storied stage — to debut the M Concept Neue Klasse, a near-production preview of the first electric M3. The move signals that BMW M is done hedging: this is the direction, whether purists like it or not, with the company reportedly keeping a petrol M3 alive as a safety net for the holdouts. Culturally, it lands at the exact moment the performance car world is being forced to decide what 'driving excitement' means when there's no engine sound to romanticize.

**Hook:**
BMW just dropped a 1,000bhp electric M3 concept at Le Mans / and they're only building a petrol backup because they know half their fans will refuse to accept it
